title: DanVet Bill
description: Generate a bill for a DanVet veterinary client, capturing the billing date, customer, description of work, and amount to charge.

components.label: Bill date
components.helpText: Defaults to today. Change if back-dating or forward-dating the invoice.

components.label: Customer name
components.helpText: Full name of the customer being billed.

components.label: Description of work done
components.helpText: Describe the veterinary services, treatments, medications and any other work performed.

components.label: Price to charge
components.helpText: Total amount to charge the customer, in GBP.
